'''鈭歸-sh-r''' ('''washara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hinform|hinform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hinform|hinform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-sh-r
|-
! Lemma
| washara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:washarithi|washarithi]] || [[word:washariji|washariji]] || [[word:washarishi|washarishi]] || [[word:washari|washari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:washaruthuth|washaruthuth]] || [[word:washarujuj|washarujuj]] || [[word:washarushush|washarushush]] || [[word:washar|washar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:washaruthu|washaruthu]] || [[word:washaruju|washaruju]] || [[word:washarushu|washarushu]] || [[word:washaru|washaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:washarufuth|washarufuth]] || [[word:washarufuj|washarufuj]] || [[word:washarufush|washarufush]] || [[word:washaruf|washaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:washarethe|washarethe]] || [[word:washareje|washareje]] || [[word:washareshe|washareshe]] || [[word:washare|washare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:washarothoth|washarothoth]] || [[word:washarojoj|washarojoj]] || [[word:washaroshosh|washaroshosh]] || [[word:washar|washar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:washarotho|washarotho]] || [[word:washarojo|washarojo]] || [[word:washarosho|washarosho]] || [[word:washaro|washaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:washarofoth|washarofoth]] || [[word:washarofoj|washarofoj]] || [[word:washarofosh|washarofosh]] || [[word:washarof|washarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:washar忙th忙|washar忙th忙]] || [[word:washar忙j忙|washar忙j忙]] || [[word:washar忙sh忙|washar忙sh忙]] || [[word:washar忙|washar忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:washarathath|washarathath]] || [[word:washarajaj|washarajaj]] || [[word:washarashash|washarashash]] || [[word:washar|washar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:washaratha|washaratha]] || [[word:washaraja|washaraja]] || [[word:washarasha|washarasha]] || [[word:washara|washara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:washarafath|washarafath]] || [[word:washarafaj|washarafaj]] || [[word:washarafash|washarafash]] || [[word:washaraf|washaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:washarasha|washarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowasharasha|gowasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwasharasha|gokiwasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:washarn眉sha|washarn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowasharnkn眉sha|gowasharnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwasharn眉sha|gokiwasharn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:washarsh毛sha|washarsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowasharnksh毛sha|gowasharnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwasharsh毛sha|gokiwasharsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:washarosha|washarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowasharnkrosha|gowasharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwasharosha|gokiwasharosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:washarmusha|washarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowasharnkmusha|gowasharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasharmusha|gokiwasharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:washarsherasha|washarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowasharnksherasha|gowasharnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwasharsherasha|gokiwasharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:washarngasha|washarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowasharnkngasha|gowasharnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwasharngasha|gokiwasharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:washaryasha|washaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowasharnkyasha|gowasharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwasharyasha|gokiwasharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:washaryamasha|washaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowasharnkyamasha|gowasharnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwasharyamasha|gokiwasharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:washarn眉sh毛sha|washarn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowasharnkn眉sh毛sha|gowasharnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwasharn眉sh毛sha|gokiwasharn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:washarn眉rosha|washarn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowasharnkn眉rosha|gowasharnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwasharn眉rosha|gokiwasharn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washarn眉musha|washarn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowasharnkn眉musha|gowasharnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasharn眉musha|gokiwasharn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:washarsh毛n眉sha|washarsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowasharnksh毛n眉sha|gowasharnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwasharsh毛n眉sha|gokiwasharsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:washarsh毛rosha|washarsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowasharnksh毛rosha|gowasharnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwasharsh毛rosha|gokiwasharsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washarsh毛musha|washarsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowasharnksh毛musha|gowasharnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasharsh毛musha|gokiwasharsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:washaron眉sha|washaron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowasharnkron眉sha|gowasharnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwasharon眉sha|gokiwasharon眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:washarosh毛sha|washarosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowasharnkrosh毛sha|gowasharnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwasharosh毛sha|gokiwasharosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:washaromusha|washaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowasharnkromusha|gowasharnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwasharomusha|gokiwasharomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:washarmun眉sha|washarmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowasharnkmun眉sha|gowasharnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwasharmun眉sha|gokiwasharmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:washarmush毛sha|washarmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowasharnkmush毛sha|gowasharnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwasharmush毛sha|gokiwasharmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:washarmurosha|washarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowasharnkmurosha|gowasharnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwasharmurosha|gokiwasharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:washar|washar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:w忙sh忙r|w忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howashar|howashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:how忙sh忙r|how忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowashar|hohowashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohow忙sh忙r|hohow忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉washar|n眉washar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉w忙sh忙r|n眉w忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉washar|n眉n眉washar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉w忙sh忙r|n眉n眉w忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂washar|n茂washar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂w忙sh忙r|n茂w忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂washar|n茂n茂washar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂w忙sh忙r|n茂n茂w忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwashar|luwashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luw忙sh忙r|luw忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwashar|luluwashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluw忙sh忙r|luluw忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwashar|liwashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liw忙sh忙r|liw忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwashar|liliwashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliw忙sh忙r|liliw忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowashar|kowashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kow忙sh忙r|kow忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowashar|kokowashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokow忙sh忙r|kokow忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewashar|kewashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kew忙sh忙r|kew忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewashar|kekewashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekew忙sh忙r|kekew忙sh忙r]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
